steps.text:
Mid-set. The music is escalating.
The panels are vibrating.

steps.speaker: Ryan
steps.text: [I've been fighting the possession. That was a mistake.]

Ryan drops his shoulders.
He stops resisting.
The slime around him darkens into a deep bruised purple.

steps.speaker: Ryan
steps.text: [I am not trapped in the goo. The goo is trapped in the pocket.]

Ryan completely transcends his human form.
He becomes a localized black hole of rhythm.

THE ETERNITY.

DOOM. CRACK. THUD.

The gravitational force is too much
for Palmer's Bar to handle.

The roof of Palmer's Bar
peels back like a sardine can.

The brick walls blow outward
in slow-motion cartoonish perfection.

The crowd scatters into the Minneapolis night.

steps.speaker: Phoenix
steps.text: My brain thinks we are officially domestic terrorists.

steps.speaker: Ryan
steps.text: I think I broke the space-time continuum on that snare fill.

From beneath a piece of fallen drywall,
Bajonka trots out, completely unfazed.

In her mouth: the keys to the van.
Under her collar: a tour itinerary.
TOMORROW: THE POTATO BELT. circled in bright red.
